design_philosophy.core_concept: Voice is Fluid & Vibrant. Learning is a Journey into Color.
design_philosophy.emotional_tone: Energetic, Immersive, Futuristic yet Human, Global
design_philosophy.visual_style: Dark mode base with explosive neon accents, glassmorphism, and fluid motion.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H6. H1/H2 must have `tracking-tight`.

styles.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tighter leading-tight text-white

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, labels, and buttons.

layout.grid_system: Use 'Bento Grid' (Mode A) for features. Use 'Container' (max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4) for standard sections.
layout.spacing: Use 'py-24' or 'py-32' for section vertical padding. Use 'gap-8' or 'gap-12' for grids.
layout.glassmorphism: Use `backdrop-blur-md bg-white/5 border border-white/10` for cards and floating elements.

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-primary text-white font-semibold px-8 py-4 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(99,102,241,0.5)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(99,102,241,0.7)] transition-all transform hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-white/10 text-white font-medium px-6 py-3 hover:bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-sm transition-all border border-white/10

cards.feature: rounded-3xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 p-8 hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors group relative overflow-hidden

navigation.style: Floating pill navbar. Fixed at top or bottom. Glassmorphism effect.

required_effects.name: Scroll-Linked Background
required_effects.description: The page background color must smoothly interpolate based on scroll position using `useScroll` and `useTransform` on a fixed background layer.

required_effects.name: Staggered Reveal
required_effects.description: Text and cards should slide up and fade in with a staggered delay.

required_effects.name: Parallax
required_effects.description: Images should move slightly slower than scroll speed.

required_effects.name: Hover Glow
required_effects.description: Buttons and cards should emit a glow or border-shine on hover.

images.alt: Diverse group of friends talking and laughing in a modern night setting
images.usage: Hero section main visual or background overlay
Background for 'How it works' or 'Features' section

images.alt: Vibrant Tokyo neon street at night
images.usage: Context/Travel section background or card image

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for UI icons (Chevron, Menu, Play, Mic). Use 'WaveformLogo' component for brand.

implementation_steps: 2. Create a 'ScrollBackground' wrapper component that uses `useScroll` to interpolate background colors.
3. Build the Hero section with split layout: Left text, Right image with 'blob' or gradient backdrop.
4. Build 'Features' using a Bento Grid layout with glassmorphism cards.
5. Build 'Interactive Demo' section - simulate a chat interface.
6. Ensure `WaveformLogo` is used in the Header.
7. Apply Framer Motion to all sections (fade-in, slide-up).
universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for text unless it's a very large headline.
Ensure contrast ratios are met. Light text on dark backgrounds.
Use 'tracking-tight' for all large headings to make them look modern.
